'''Kibo Geothermal Station''' was a geothermal power plant on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It was near [[Kibo Lake]] and west of the [[Zantay Hills]].

The station consisted of a white [[Duracrete/Legends|duracrete]] dome with several high towers along its periphery. During [[the Uprisings]] it had been considered a likely target for the [[Desert Wind]] terrorist group; by [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]] it had been given additional security funds.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
